<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Resume</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
            margin: 20px;
            background-color: #f4f4f4;
        }
        .resume {
            background: white;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
        }
        table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
        }
        th, td {
            padding: 8px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            text-align: left;
        }
        a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: #007bff;
        }
        a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }
        img {
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="resume">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Profile Image" width="100">
        <h1>krishna verma</h1>
        <p><strong>Email:</strong> <a href="mailto:johndoe@example.com">krishnavema@gmail.com</a></p>
        <p><strong>Phone:</strong> +919209628369</p>
        <hr>
        <h2>Education</h2>
        <table>
            <tr>
                <th>Degree</th>
                <th>Institution</th>
                <th>Year</th>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td>B.Tech cse (ai&ml) </td>
                <td>SBJ institute of technology </td>
                <td>2029</td>
            </tr>
        </table>
        <h2>Skills</h2>
        <ul>
            <li>speciliased in NumPy and PyTorch</li>
            <li>CSS</li>
            <li>JavaScript</li>
        </ul>
        <h2>Experience</h2>
        <p>Intern @ TCS Corp (2025)</p>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
